channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Tile's Back With Trackers That One-Up AirTags
item.description: Remember Tile? They were one of the first Bluetooth tracking tags, and now they have four new products. The company—fresh off its Life360 acquisition—hopes to stand out in a world of AirTags and Android Trackers with unique features.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KTLA 5

item.title: Wright Brothers Memorial plane crash victims identified, include 6-year-old child
item.description: Wright Brothers National Memorial have released the names of the adult victims killed when a single-engine plane crashed near the airport on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Water and power outages test patience in the Southeast
item.description: In remote mountain areas, helicopters hoisted the stranded to safety while search crews waded through floodwaters and moved toppled trees so they could look door to door for survivors.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Harris, Biden take in Helene’s destruction in separate visits to Carolinas, Georgia
item.description: President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have toured the hurricane-devastated areas of North Carolina and Georgia.
item.dc:creator: Chris Megerian And Colleen Long, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: GOP leaders press Biden administration to get tougher on Iran after missile attack
item.description: Republican leaders on Capitol Hill are calling on President Biden to get tougher on Iran in the wake of Tuesday’s missile attack on Israel, urging the administration to adopt a series of specific measures designed to cripple the military powers of Tehran and its proxies.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Trump takes lead over Harris in North Carolina Quinnipiac survey
item.description: Trump leads with 49 percent support, Harris earns 47 percent support, Green Party candidate Jill Stein gets 1 percent support and Justice For All Party candidate Cornel West gets 1 percent support in the Quinnipiac University poll conducted in late September and released Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: McDonald’s is bringing back its famous ‘Boo Buckets,’ with a new color
item.description: McDonald's famous Boo Buckets are making a return just in time for Halloween, and a new color has joined the lineup this year.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KRON4

item.title: Cook Political Report shifts Texas Senate race toward Democrats
item.description: The Cook Political Report on Tuesday shifted Texas’s Senate race from "likely Republican" to "lean Republican," signaling momentum for Rep. Colin Allred's (D) challenge against incumbent Sen. Ted Cruz (R) in the red state.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Education a potential flashpoint in Vance-Walz vice presidential debate
item.description: Education hardly came up in last month’s Trump-Harris presidential debate, but it could be a central focus at Tuesday’s undercard event.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: My car was submerged in floodwaters. Should I start it?
item.description: Storm surges and flooding from Hurricane Helene have caused widespread devastation across parts of the Southeastern U.S., in some cases leaving homes and cars completely underwater.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: After Helene's destruction, a mountain town reliant on fall tourism wonders what's next
item.description: BOONE, N.C. (AP) — Freddie Pell helps lift a vintage wooden chair off the sidewalk and back inside his art gallery. It's starting to rain in downtown Boone, and he doesn't want it to get soaked — again.
item.dc:creator: MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Helene's death toll passes 150 as crews search for survivors in North Carolina's mountains
item.description: Cadaver dogs and search crews trudged through knee-deep muck and debris on Tuesday looking in the mountains of western North Carolina for victims of Hurricane Helene, days after the storm carved a deadly and destructive path through the Southeast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Hair found in truck helps police identify suspect in 1995 disappearance of Morgan Nick, 6
item.description: ALMA, Ark. (AP) — Hair found in a truck once owned by an Arkansas man who died in prison more than two decades ago was the clue investigators needed to connect the dead inmate to the disappearance of a 6-year-old girl who went missing in 1995.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DEMILLO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Teens arrested for stomping on man's head during brutal armed attack in Baltimore
item.description: Two teens have been arrested for a brutal caught-on-video attack in Baltimore where a 66-year-old man was stomped in the head and mugged.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Tuesday's vice presidential debate could matter more than history suggests
item.description: Tim Walz and JD Vance might have the chance to reshape the political landscape Tuesday in their first and only debate.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Publix donates $1 million to support disaster relief following Hurricane Helene
item.description: Florida-based grocery chain, Publix, announced it's making a major contribution to help relief efforts in areas affected by the catastrophic damage left behind by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Kaycee Sloan, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Helene's death toll surpasses 150 as crews continue to search for survivors
item.description: Exhausted emergency workers continued to work around-the-clock to clear roads, restore power and cellphone service, and reach people left stranded by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NHC tracking disturbance near where Helene formed | Tracking the Tropics
item.description: How strong it will be and where is it going to go? This afternoon on Tracking the Tropics, we'll break down what we know about the disturbance and where it could be headed.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, Fox 5

item.title: Israel says Iran has fired missiles at Israel and it warned residents to shelter in place
item.description: JERUSALEM (AP) — The Israeli military said Tuesday that Iran has fired missiles at Israel, and air raid sirens sounded across the country as residents were ordered to remain close to bomb shelters. Israel and the United States have warned there would be severe consequences if Iran attacks.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, JULIA FRANKEL and BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Senate Democrat calls for Congress to return to pass disaster aid after Hurricane Helene
item.description: Sen. Chris Van Hollen (D-Md.) on Tuesday called for the Senate to return from its lengthy preelection recess to pass a disaster aid package following the damage left in multiple states by Hurricane Helene. “I think we should pass it yesterday.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, WGN 9

item.title: Eric Adams calls out alleged collusion of feds and mainstream media, asks judge for 'consequences'
item.description: Lawyers for New York City Mayor Eric Adams are seeking sanctions against the Department of Justice, which they accuse of leaking details of his indictment.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Are professional athletes playing too many games?
item.description: Fans, athletes and medical experts have been having discussions on the increasing demand for players starting from the time they first start playing, all the way up to the professional ranks.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, Fox 5

item.title: Murders, mayhem and officer's gunfire lead to charges at Brooklyn jail where 'Diddy' is held
item.description: Criminal charges unsealed Monday offer a fresh window into violence and dysfunction that has plagued the Brooklyn federal jail where Sean “Diddy” Combs and Sam Bankman-Fried are locked up.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak, KRON4

item.title: Helene's death toll surpasses 150 as crews continue to search for survivors
item.description: Exhausted emergency workers continued to work around-the-clock to clear roads, restore power and cellphone service, and reach people left stranded by Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump and Harris' running mates are set to face off and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A century of Jimmy Carter: Longest-living former president turns 100
item.description: In 1998, at the ripe age of 74, former President Carter put some of his thoughts about getting older to paper. "The virtues of aging," Carter wrote in a book that year, "include both the blessings that come to us as we grow older and what we have to offer that might be beneficial to others.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, ABC 4

item.title: Donate today to help Red Cross efforts across 10 states
item.description: Days after Hurricane Helene's deadly force tore a path north from the Gulf Coast, many Americans remained without power, water and other basic necessities.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, Fox 5

item.title: Maya Rudolph as Harris and Dana Carvey as Biden open the 50th season of 'Saturday Night Live'
item.description: “Saturday Night Live” began its 50th season with a parade of former co-stars, including Maya Rudolph as Vice President Kamala Harris, Andy Samberg as her husband Doug Emhoff and Dana Carvey as President Joe Biden.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Kris Kristofferson, singer-songwriter and actor, dies at 88
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Kris Kristofferson, a Rhodes scholar with a deft writing style and rough charisma who became a country music superstar and an A-list Hollywood actor, has died. Kristofferson died at his home on Maui, Hawaii, on Saturday, family spokeswoman Ebie McFarland said in an email.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DALTON and KRISTIN M. HALL, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Supplies arrive by plane and mule as Helene death toll passes 100
item.description: Desperate residents isolated by washed-out roads and the lack of power and cellular service in western North Carolina lined up Monday for fresh water and a chance to message loved ones that they were alive.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lawmakers fear 'chaos' if Trump-Harris race goes to the wire
item.description: Lawmakers in both parties are bracing themselves for a messy aftermath to Election Day as polls show the race between former President Trump and Vice President Harris is so close in several battleground states that it could take days to determine the winner.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden says he hopes to visit Helene-impacted areas this week if it doesn't impact emergency response
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden says he will visit Hurricane Helene-impacted areas this week as long as it does not disrupt rescue and recovery operations. Biden was briefed again on Sunday evening about the impact of the devastating storm on an enormous swath of the Southeast.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Stuck NASA astronauts welcome SpaceX capsule that'll bring them home next year
item.description: CAPE CANAVERAL, Fla. (AP) — The two astronauts stuck at the International Space Station since June welcomed their new ride home with Sunday’s arrival of a SpaceX capsule.
item.dc:creator: MARCIA DUNN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NHC monitors several disturbances in the Gulf and Atlantic
item.description: The National Hurricane Center is monitoring numerous disturbances in the Gulf and Atlantic after Hurricane Helene impacted several states.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Here are the top 10 states where you're likely to find gold: survey
item.description: According to a survey conducted by SD Bullion, Colorado remains the seventh-highest gold-producing state in the United States even in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, Fox 5

item.title: This Halloween decoration can be dangerous for deer, wildlife officials warn
item.description: Fall is in full swing and many have already decked out their properties with Halloween decorations, but wildlife experts say that one decoration in particular can be harmful to deer in the area.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Unger, ABC 4

item.title: Memphis man gets life sentence for killing rapper Young Dolph
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Justin Johnson was found guilty of murder in the death of rapper Young Dolph on Thursday after the jury heard testimony from a co-defendant that the killing was part of a feud between rival record labels.
item.dc:creator: TRAVIS LOLLER and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, WGN 9
